rule_metadata.name: spynote_variants
rule_metadata.author: 5h1vang https://analyst.koodous.com/analysts/5h1vang
rule_metadata.description: Yara rule for detection of different Spynote Variants

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule spynote_variants
{
	meta:
		author = "5h1vang https://analyst.koodous.com/analysts/5h1vang"
		description = "Yara rule for detection of different Spynote Variants"
		source = " http://researchcenter.paloaltonetworks.com/2016/07/unit42-spynote-android-trojan-builder-leaked/"
		rule_source = "https://analyst.koodous.com/rulesets/1710"

	strings:
		$str_1 = "SERVER_IP" nocase
		$str_2 = "SERVER_NAME" nocase
		$str_3 = "content://sms/inbox"
		$str_4 = "screamHacker"
		$str_5 = "screamon"

	condition:
		androguard.package_name( "dell.scream.application" ) or androguard.certificate.sha1 ( "219D542F901D8DB85C729B0F7AE32410096077CB" ) or all of ( $str_* )
}
